checks.message: All required top-level fields present: project, services, databases, entities, endpoints, workers, integrations, security, observability, meta, envVars, files
project.deploymentTarget 'railway' is a valid enum value
project.framework 'fastapi' is a valid enum value
API service declares healthCheck.live=/health/live and healthCheck.ready=/health/ready — Rule 25 compliant
Worker service correctly omits healthCheck — worker services do not expose HTTP
4 workers declared; all reference 'redis' database which is present in databases[]
All integration envVars declared: Resend (RESEND_API_KEY), S3 (4 vars). All appear in envVars.api[]
Worker env vars are a valid subset of API env vars (DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL present in both)
security.securityMdIncluded=true, security.secretScanning=true, security.dependencyAudit='pip-audit', security.corsWhitelistConfigured=true — Rule 13 baseline met
security.authStrategy='jwt-hs256', security.passwordHashing='argon2id' — compliant with security.md requirements
Api-keys playbook applied; security.piiFieldsEncrypted=false — no PHI detected; API key hash-only storage confirmed in blueprint
No PHI entity names detected (no MedicalRecord, Diagnosis, Prescription). project.complianceScope='none' — no HIPAA requirements apply
observability.healthEndpointsPlanned=true; both healthLive='/health/live' and healthReady='/health/ready' declared — Rule 25 compliant
services[] count = 2 (api, worker). observability.distributedTracing=false. Distributed tracing is recommended for multi-service deployments.
checks.fixHint: Add opentelemetry-sdk + opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi to api; add OTel task header propagation in ARQ worker (pass trace context via job kwargs). Set observability.distributedTracing=true once implemented. distributedTracingNote already declares intent for v1.1.

assumptions: idempotency.md applied: POST /links uses Idempotency-Key header with Redis SETEX 24h; ARQ job dispatch uses deterministic job_id — confirmed in blueprint Section 5
Rate limiting on click tracking endpoint (200/min per IP) implemented via slowapi + Redis — confirmed in blueprint Section 4
API key full value returned once on creation, never stored — confirmed in blueprint Section 8
ClickEvent.ip_hash stores SHA-256(IP) — raw IP not persisted — privacy-by-design

fixHints.action: Add opentelemetry-sdk==1.x, opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi, opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-http to requirements.txt. Configure OTLPSpanExporter in lifespan. For ARQ worker: pass trace context as a job kwarg dict and restore span context in task handler. Set OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var in Railway dashboard.
